name: Small Multipurpose Storage Bin Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Bring additional storage space into your home with this Small Multipurpose Storage Bin from Brightroom™. The plastic storage bin features a spacious design to provide ample space for universal storage, and the clear construction makes it an easy pairing with other decor. Complete with side cutouts for easy carrying from room to room, this small multipurpose bin is great for stowing away books and magazines to keep your home looking neat and tidy.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Overall Width: 13 inches
Overall Height: 9.75 inches
Overall Depth: 3.56 inches
Interior Width: 12.9 inches
Interior Depth: 3.4 inches
Bottom Width: 12.25 inches
Bottom Depth: 2.82 inches
